purpose: Close four reviewed held candidates after promotion through D-1000 BX19 without rewriting the historical base resolution index.

entries.notes: D-1000 BX19 promoted the held BULK candidate as canonical entity hei_ex_000990 with limited status. Current evidence establishes testnet, staged access, and Season 1 pre-deposits but not equivalent proof of broadly available live mainnet trading. The candidate must not remain open or return as new growth work.

D-1000 BX19 completed current first-party and independent evidence review and promoted the held Rysk V12 candidate as canonical entity hei_ex_000991. The candidate must not remain open or return as new growth work.

D-1000 BX19 completed current first-party and independent evidence review and promoted the held AFX candidate as canonical entity hei_ex_000992. The candidate must not remain open or return as new growth work.

D-1000 BX19 completed current first-party and independent evidence review and promoted the held Antarctic candidate as canonical entity hei_ex_000993. The candidate must not remain open or return as new growth work.
